examples: Her writings have extraordinary depth and solidity.
Natives give it solidity and continuity; but the settlers give it passion.
Abbot H.Thayer has suggested that this gradation obliterates the appearance of solidity, which is due to shadow.
It just goes to prove the solidity of the work that we've all been doing.
Two layers are glued, nailed and reinforced with an organic resin to assure solidity.
